item.furyborn.sunraiser_drive_desc: The ultimate power source, made by sealing a star.
item.furyborn.system_xrossalive_desc: A drive device to synchronize star systems and draw out more power.
item.furyborn.t_supercomputer_desc: A quantum supercomputer capable of processing data models.
item.furyborn.robit_datamodel_desc: A foundational data model. Contains recorded information of a Robit.
item.furyborn.null_datamodel_desc: A data model of something. An unknown darkness lurks behind the peeled label.
item.furyborn.robyte_datamodel_desc: An overfitted data model of a Robit. Its internal data has mysteriously mutated.
item.furyborn.halo_of_exolumen_desc1: §1The Zenith of the Endeavor, §a§lHalo of Exolumen.
item.furyborn.halo_of_exolumen_desc2: §1A lost relic of a civilization from a long-forgotten era.
item.furyborn.halo_of_exolumen_desc3: §8The war tore the stars apart, and the pioneers fled beyond the sky.
item.furyborn.halo_of_exolumen_desc4: §8The future of the stars is now in your hands.
item.furyborn.robyte_chip_desc: An unidentified chip. It looks like a component of something, but its purpose is unknown.
item.furyborn.robyte_chip_awaken_desc: An activated Meka Plate. It shows strong affinity to artificial objects.
item.furyborn.nanocore_ingot_desc: An ore containing crystallized nanomachines. It shows strong resonance with artificial objects.
item.furyborn.unknown_circuit_desc: A circuit to control antimatter and use it for computation. It uses unknown technology.
item.furyborn.exolumen_datamodel_desc1: A data model that contains all sealed light. It records information left by the developers of the previous era.
block.furyborn.halo_projector_desc: A projection device that displays the last century. Records of the Universal Century are stored inside.
block.furyborn.mek_dirt_desc: A nanomachine that looks like dirt.
block.furyborn.mek_cobblestone_desc: A nanomachine, that looks like cobblestone.
block.furyborn.mek_tall_grass_desc: A nanomachine, that looks like tall grass.
block.furyborn.mek_grass_block_desc: A nanomachine, that looks like a grass block.
block.furyborn.meka_sunflower_desc: A nanomachine, that looks like a sunflower.
block.furyborn.exolumen_portal_desc: An aurora gate that, connects to a new world.
block.furyborn.portal_frame_mek_desc: A machine frame to maintain the, portal.
block.furyborn.supercharged_coil_portal_: A coil to generate, the portal.
